screens.name: projects/11940467736549131072/screens/4a68d616923c46299d027c2fb23dc696
screens.prompt:
Title: Mobile Hero - Lucas Santana Portfolio
Context: A premium, recruiter-focused personal portfolio mobile app for Lucas Santana, a Senior Software Engineer, featuring a neo-dark cinematic aesthetic.
Description of the screen: The mobile hero section. Features a deep graphite background with a subtle cinematic noise. A large, expressive serif headline 'Lucas Santana' in cyan, with 'Senior Software Engineer' in a clean mono font below it. A circular profile portrait placeholder with an amber rim light glow. A prominent 'Download Resume' button with a cyan glow effect. The layout is optimized for a single-column mobile view with generous vertical spacing. variant 1 of 1
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
screens.title: Mobile Hero - Lucas Santana Portfolio

screens.name: projects/11940467736549131072/screens/ceb8a39945924c56a3731286850ba12f
screens.prompt:
Title: Mobile Metrics & Projects
Context: A premium, recruiter-focused personal portfolio mobile app for Lucas Santana, a Senior Software Engineer, featuring a neo-dark cinematic aesthetic.
Description of the screen: The mobile impact metrics and projects section. Impact metrics (40% Efficiency, 40% Incident Response, etc.) are displayed in a 2x2 grid of small, dark cards with amber accents and cyan data points. Below this, 'Featured Projects' appear as full-width cards with high-contrast imagery and monospace technical tags. Large touch targets for project details. variant 1 of 1
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
screens.title: Mobile Metrics & Projects

screens.name: projects/11940467736549131072/screens/20b243dfb78b4a1090884aa53d2dab8b
screens.prompt:
Title: Mobile Experience & Contact
Context: A premium, recruiter-focused personal portfolio mobile app for Lucas Santana, a Senior Software Engineer, featuring a neo-dark cinematic aesthetic.
Description of the screen: The mobile experience and contact section. A simplified vertical timeline with a thin cyan line and amber nodes. Each milestone shows the company name and role in a clear, readable sans-serif font. The footer features a large 'Let\'s Build' CTA with a simplified contact form or a single large 'Send Email' button that glows with an amber radial gradient. variant 1 of 1
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
screens.title: Mobile Experience & Contact

outputComponents.text:
The mobile version of Lucas Santana's portfolio has been designed with a focus on premium aesthetics and optimized mobile usability:

- **Mobile Hero**: A bold introduction featuring a vertically stacked layout with Lucas's name in cyan serif typography, an amber-lit profile portrait, and a high-contrast 'Download Resume' call-to-action.
- **Mobile Metrics & Projects**: Impact metrics are presented in a space-efficient 2x2 grid, followed by full-width project cards designed for easy vertical scrolling and clear thumb-friendly interaction.
- **Mobile Experience & Contact**: A streamlined career timeline with cyan and amber accents leads into a cinematic contact footer, featuring a large, glowing action button for direct communication.

The navigation has been simplified to a bottom bar for easy one-handed access. Would you like to see how the 'Deep-Dive Case Study' looks on mobile, or should we refine the contact form further?

outputComponents.suggestion: Design the mobile project detail screen.
Add a technical skills section with a custom bar graph.
Create a dark mode vs. light mode toggle comparison.
